---
title: Boutique Japon
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557477/japon2_20230730_ynrehf.png
description: devanture de boutique japonaise, cours de savoir dessiner en aquarelle
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2023/12/05
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557477/japon2_20230730_ynrehf.png)
